title: SACRAMENTO – Today,
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: AB 1228 increased the minimum wage for fast-food workers to $20 dollars an hour.
A specific exemption in AB 1228 reportedly benefits a Panera Bread franchisee who is a longtime acquaintance and donor of over $220,000 to Governor Newsom’s campaigns.
If the Governor helped exempt one of his largest political donors from a bill that harms small businesses, it raises concerns about pay-to-play politics.
Overregulation of small and large businesses, as enacted by AB 1228, will lead to more food serving businesses leaving California.
